name: Little Fight NYC

orange.role: Lead signal — CTAs, accents, the NYC tag. Use it like it's expensive.

midnight.role: Primary background — the NYC night-street ground.

panelDeep.role: Recessed surface, one step under panel.

burst.role: Ambient blue burst — background glow. Never competes with orange.

burstBright.role: Interactive blue accent — links, data highlights.

ink.role: Primary text on dark, and the mark on light grounds.

onOrange.role: Text/ink placed on an orange fill. Palette reference only — not in SITE_MAP, so not synced to a surface.

display.use: Headlines and the wordmark — the loud voice.

body.use: All reading text — humanist, plain, honest.

mark.name: The Tugboat
mark.idea: The little guy who moves the big guy.
mark.clearspace: ≥ the height of the smokestack on all sides

footer: Designed, Hosted and Cared For by LittleFightNYC.com
